query: My local model calls a web search tool but the tool results never appear in its answers—fix the tool-use failure.
expected_behavior: Distinguish between a controller/runtime issue and a model capability issue instead of assuming the model is bad.
Run tool-use specific probes or diagnostics that expose whether the tool call payloads or controller orchestration is at fault.
If the evidence points to a runtime or controller failure, route toward fixing the controller or runtime rather than immediately scheduling training.
